taskSummary: Create GOV.UK/Nunjucks templates and SASS-owned route styles for the search, notes, consent and sessions utility pages.
implementationHighlights: Added Nunjucks templates for search, notes, consent and sessions under src/govuk/templates/pages/.
Registered the four pages in scripts/govuk/render-govuk-pages.mjs.
Added src/styles/researchops-utility-pages.scss and generated CSS targets for public/css/search.css, public/css/notes.css, public/css/consent.css and public/css/sessions.css.
Reworked dynamic route output to use GOV.UK summary cards, summary lists, details and tags.
Updated route-state tests to cover Nunjucks ownership, GOV.UK macro usage and generated SASS stylesheet ownership.
